text_original: it's great and most bots have a good memory.
text_zh: 它很棒，而且大多数机器人的记忆力都很好。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! We are thrilled to hear that you are enjoying the experience and that our bots' memories are serving you well. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going! If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for being awesome!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您非常喜欢这种体验，并且我们的机器人记忆功能对您有所帮助，我们感到非常激动。您的支持是激励我们不断前行的动力！如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。感谢您的支持，您太棒了！
